title: All Foxes Need Thigh Highs
description: Modification of Fox Thigh Highs by Donovan_DMC with support for Vulpine and foxbox.
body:
Modification of [Fox Thigh Highs](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fox-thigh-highs) to support modded foxes from [Vulpine](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulpine) and [Foxbox](https://modrinth.com/mod/foxbox)

Makes foxes more colorful. Foxes will have pink thigh highs and arm warmers. Has support for modded and vanilla fox variants. If optifine or [ETF - Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) is installed, colors will be randomized.

## Credits
- [Donovan_DMC](https://modrinth.com/user/Donovan_DMC) - For the Original Resource Pack
- [Talon Fox](https://modrinth.com/user/TalonFox) - For Vulpine Textures
- [Niterux](https://github.com/Niterux) - Creator of this Resource Pack
